extraction_reasoning: The litigation table separates matters By and Against: I excluded the By Company row (95 criminal cases, 3 civil matters and ₹505.62 million) and counted the Against rows across listed entities. Against counts are criminal: 1 against the Company plus 1 against Subsidiaries = 2; statutory/regulatory: 6 against the Company and none against Directors or Promoters = 6; tax: 85 against the Company and nil against Subsidiaries = 85. The quantified aggregate amount against the Company is ₹4,121.89 million, including ₹4,087.28 million for 85 tax matters; the Subsidiary amount is not quantifiable, so the group total is ₹4,121.89 million, converted from million to ₹412.189 crore by dividing by 10. Contingent liabilities use the stated Total of ₹5,927.64 million as of September 30, 2023, converted to ₹592.764 crore; no company-wide top-five or top-ten customer concentration percentage is disclosed, while the disclosed percentages concern top global technology brands and are not customers.
